step_rationale: Sphingoid-base lipid; ventricular fibrillation predictor post-STEMI unrelated to plaque rupture.
mechanism: Dehydrophytosphingosine is a sphingolipid metabolite whose abundance predicts post-STEMI ventricular fibrillation risk.

references.title: Human Plasma Metabolomics Identify 9-cis-retinoic Acid and Dehydrophytosphingosine Levels as Novel biomarkers for Early Ventricular Fibrillation after ST-elevated Myocardial Infarction.
